<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the Monolog package. * * (c) Jordi Boggiano <j.boggiano@seld.be> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Monolog\Handler; use Monolog\LogRecord; /** * Base Handler class providing the Handler structure, including processors and formatters * * Classes extending it should (in most cases) only implement write($record) * * @author Jordi Boggiano <j.boggiano@seld.be> * @author Christophe Coevoet <stof@notk.org> */ abstract class AbstractProcessingHandler extends AbstractHandler implements ProcessableHandlerInterface, FormattableHandlerInterface { use ProcessableHandlerTrait; use FormattableHandlerTrait; /** * @inheritDoc */ public function handle(LogRecord $record): bool { if (!$this->isHandling($record)) { return false; } if (\count($this->processors) > 0) { $record = $this->processRecord($record); } $record->formatted = $this->getFormatter()->format($record); $this->write($record); return false === $this->bubble; } /** * Writes the (already formatted) record down to the log of the implementing handler */ abstract protected function write(LogRecord $record): void; public function reset(): void { parent::reset(); $this->resetProcessors(); } }
